title: callitriche intermedia var. pedunculata
intro: Callitriche intermedia var. pedunculata, also known as water starwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of water starwort include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, water starwort can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
